name: CourseLens - 02 Lecture Signal Agent v1 HTTP OpenAI

parameters.content:
Lecture Signal Agent v1

Purpose:
Extract classroom emphasis signals from already-extracted lecture notes, transcripts, or board-writing text.

Current scope:
- Input is JSON with course_name, course_id, and lectures[].text.
- The agent extracts explicit emphasis, repetition, extended explanations, examples, homework/exam links, student questions, board-writing signals, and summary markers.
- The parser node converts the LLM output into strict JSON.

Important boundary:
This workflow does not predict exam questions or declare must-test content. It only reports evidence-grounded lecture signals.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-5.5", temperature: 0.2, messages: [ { role: "system", content: $json.llm_payload.system_prompt }, { role: "user", content: $json.llm_payload.user_prompt } ] }) }}
